sentence.chinese: 人們從未見過長翅膀的魚，於是將飛魚和潮間帶採集的海產帶回家一起烹煮來吃，從那時候起，人們就長膿瘡，飛魚則病懨懨的。飛魚們開會探究生病的原因。原來是人類將飛魚和潮間帶海產一起煮，導致人類長瘡、飛魚生病。
sentence.ab: ji pa nimakacita sira o tao so mipanid a among, apen da do vahey da pazavozen do sinavat da do keysakan a dengdengen a yakan da, nimacipinda no kanonang o kapikanokanoka da, mikeyngeyngen sira o alibangbang ang. meykaygi sira o alibangbang a komala so ipikeyngeyngen da, a ipikanokanoka no tao. orii neykakman sang ta nipazavoz da do among no rayon o sinavat da do keyngapngapan, ori o da nipikanokanoka no tao, am da nipikeyngeyngen no alibangbang ang.

sentence.chinese: 飛魚的領袖黑翅飛魚說：「人類生瘡很可憐，我們生病也很痛苦，不如我去告訴並教導他們如何處理飛魚吧！」其他飛魚都一致贊成。
sentence.ab: maniring o mavaheng so panid am, “ya mangasi o tao, a tamo makasi a ya mikeyngeyngen, no komwan am to ko rana angey jira mapamizing sira do akakanan da so among no rayon!” ka toda nganopan do ciring na.

sentence.chinese: 於是，黑翅飛魚趁耆老睡覺時託夢給他，說：「您們之所以生病長膿瘡，是因為把飛魚和螃蟹、貝類和其他海產一起煮。我們是飛魚，您們要用專用鍋煮飛魚，及專用盤子端出來吃，表示對我們的尊重。」
sentence.ab: miratateng am, mangey na patateynepan o rarakeh no mavaheng so panid, maniring am, “ori o nyo ipikanokanoka ta nyo pazavozen o alibangbang do sinasinavat do keysakan a ya dengdengen. patareken nyo o zanegan nyo so among no rayon, a kapatarek nyo so arawan nyo sya do amongan, panadnaden nyo yamen ta among namen do rayon.”

sentence.chinese: 黑翅飛魚對耆老說：「明天您吃過早餐後，您去do Yabnoy那裡，我會去那裡跟您說話。」耆老醒來後雖然半信半疑，但仍前往黑翅飛魚指定地點do Yabnoy赴約。黑翅飛魚對耆老說：「昨晚託夢給您的就是我，現在我要教導您如何捕撈飛魚和殺飛魚、曬飛魚和煮飛魚等。往後你們就遵照我教導您的話去做。」
sentence.ab: maniring o mavaheng so panid am, “simateyka ka romyag simarow am, mangey ka do Yabnoy, ta ya amyan so ko ipanci jimo.” mayokey o rarakeh am, tana ji na nganoyongi o tateynep na am, nionotan na mangey do Yabnoy. maniring o mavaheng so panid do rarakeh am, “yaken o nimapatateynep jimo no kamahep ang, nanaoen ko imo do panlanlagan nyo do among no rayon, a ka no amoamongan nyo sya, teyrayan nyo sya, a ka no zanegan nyo sya, a makakadey a panlanlagan nyo do among no rayon. no makoa am, pangozayan nyo o ko ninanao jimo a ciring.”

sentence.chinese: 黑翅飛魚將有關飛魚的知識和禁忌告訴耆老，從飛魚祭前的準備，如砍專用晒魚架到各月份不同的捕撈方式，介紹飛魚的種類及如何殺魚、曬魚、烹煮，還有專用鍋盤的規定等等，都鉅細靡遺地告訴耆老，要他嚴格遵守、傳承。耆老將此事轉告並訓示部落族人，從此人們食用飛魚再也沒有生瘡，飛魚也沒有生病了。
sentence.ab:
nimakapya o mavaheng so panid a nimnanao so rarakeh do akakanan so among no rayon a ka no malag do among no rayon, amyapo do panban so zazawan, kangey na do mikataretarek a vehavehan do pitawazan so makakadey a among, pakotokoten na ipanci do rarakeh o raingan so among no rayon, teyrayan sya, zanegan sya, a ka no arawan sya a amongan, a ka no makakadey a panlanlagan nya. 
[===]
vahangsoen no rarakeh o ciring no mavaheng so panid a inanao na so keylian na, nimacipinda noka nang o ka jida rana mikanokanokan no tao, ka jida rana ingenan no alibangbang ang.
